facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 136 reviews. One diving club on Trần Hưng Đạo.

Phil Hai Diving Club is putting up numbers that most Phu Quoc spots can only dream about. Certified instructors, clear warm water, and a crew that actually cares if you come back up smiling.

First dive or 50th, this is where Phu Quoc's underwater world starts. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Fins on. Mask down. The reef off Phu Quoc looks like this. Phil Hai Diving Club is rated 4.9 stars across 136 reviews and it shows the second you hit the water.
